name: Cefoxitin
executiveSummary: Cephamycin with anaerobic coverage; colorectal and gynecological surgical prophylaxis.
indications:
## Indications

- Polymicrobial intra-abdominal infections.
- Surgical prophylaxis with anaerobic risk.

## Precautions

- Adjust in CKD.

> Adjust per institutional protocol and medical prescription.
stability:
## Stability

- Use within 6–24 h depending on diluent.

bibliography.citation: ANMAT. Información de medicamentos y prospectos autorizados en Argentina.
Sociedad Argentina de Infectología (SADI). Guías y consensos.
Infectious Diseases Society of America (IDSA). Guías clínicas.
